summary: Completed frontend testing of TradeLife wordmark visual refinements iteration 3. All 13 test criteria passed successfully including upright serif font, blue arc/energy line, and form functionality.
passed_tests: Login page loads at /login without errors
TradeLife wordmark displays with Playfair Display upright (non-italic) serif font
Wordmark text is NOT italic (font-style: normal)
Tagline 'Built for trades' is visible with decorative lines on each side
Blue arc/energy line is visible behind the wordmark (3 layers: arc, bloom, halo)
Sign in button is present and clickable
Google button is present and clickable
Forgot password and Sign up links work correctly
No console errors on the login page
